title: thecopus secunda
side_effects: Thecopus secunda can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea. Additionally, excessive consumption of this plant may lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals. In severe cases, the improper use of Thecopus secunda can cause respiratory problems, such as shortness of breath and bronchial spasms. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant to ensure safe and effective use.
